examples: They were determined to go back to the land of their forefathers.
As I walked along the river towards the ford, I thought about my forefathers.
From ancient times our forefathers have laboured, lived and multiplied on this land.
Widely hailed as the forefathers of today's electronic-dance-music revolution, the group has a devoted cult following.
The Jewish people are not strangers in our ancestral homeland, the land of our forefathers.
